events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from UCSF Medical Center for client 1004. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, cardiovascular. Allergies: fish, dairy. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Mexican; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Chinatown.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Fajita Bowl
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 57 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Black Bean and Rice Bowl
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 56 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/600 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 40–55) ✓, no fish/dairy ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/600 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 40–55) ✓, no fish/dairy ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/600 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 40–55) ✓, no fish/dairy ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1004 added to route R-CHIN-1 (Chinatown), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1004: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
